proof_attempts:
intro N

    have : n ^ 2 + 1 > N ^ 2 + 1 := h_n2.trans_lt' hp_large
    exact Nat.lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (by norm_num) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ this)

  have h_pos : h > 0 := by
    have : 2 * n < p := by
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le (Nat.mul_div_le_p 2 n).symm.trans (by rw [Nat.mul_comm]; exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 h_n_bound)))
      intro h_eq; have := hp.one_lt.trans_le (h_eq.symm.sub_le 0); rw [← h_eq] at hp; exact Nat.not_prime_even hp (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt this) rfl
    exact Nat.sub_pos_of_lt this
  have h_p_dvd_h2 : p ∣ h ^ 2 + 4 := by
    have : (h : ZMod p) ^ 2 + 4 = (p - 2 * n : ZMod p) ^ 2 + 4 := rfl
    rw [ZMod.coe_sub, ZMod.coe_mul, ZMod.coe_nat_cast, ZMod.coe_nat_cast, ZMod.zero_sub, neg_sq, mul_pow, h_n_sq] at this
    exact ZMod.val_eq_zero.mp (by simp [this])
  have h_h_odd : h % 2 = 1 := by
    rw [h_def, Nat.sub_mod, Nat.Prime.mod_two_eq_one_of_odd hp (hp.odd_of_poly_special (Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h_p_dvd)), Nat.mul_mod_right]
    rfl
  have k_odd : ((h ^ 2 + 4) / p) % 2 = 1 := by
    apply Nat.odd_of_mul_odd (a := p)

  have k_not_three : (h ^ 2 + 4) / p ≠ 3 := by

    have h_mod3 : (h ^ 2 + 4) % 3 = (3 * p) % 3 := congr_arg (· % 3) this

    cases h % 3 <;> rename_i v <;> linarith [h_mod3]
  have h2_gt_2n : h ^ 2 > 2 * n := by
